item.text: The original stale reconnect issue is fixed for the follow-up-chat path. I’m checking the remaining wording and edge cases around when a historical prompt should still count as pending.

item.aggregated_output:
304	Enter submits the buffered chat text. When an agent chat is selected in command mode, `/` focuses the
   305	chat, seeds the chat buffer with `/`, and enters insert mode so `/status`-style input submits through
   306	the same selected-agent chat path.
   307	
   308	The terminal app maps a session to a left-pane `READY` marker when the controller exposes no loading
   309	state for that session. `TerminalUi` queues one terminal bell when a chat transitions into the ready
   310	state and renders ready rows in reverse video so they remain highlighted until the chat becomes busy
   311	again. A selected patch-agent chat that contains the feature-done prompt treats `yes` as a local close
   312	action that hides the left-pane row without resuming the agent. `no` clears the prompt state and keeps
   313	the chat open. Any other chat text clears the prompt state, reveals the row if it was hidden, and
   314	continues through the normal selected-agent send path.
   315	
   316	`src/ui.rs::TerminalUi` owns terminal-specific presentation state:
